mapper.select:
/* MrktMgmtMapper.getMarketingHistoryList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM ,B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM ,B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.STRT_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STRT_DTTM ,DECODE(A.AGR_YN,'Y','동의','미동의') AS AGR_YN /*20230821 개인정보 수집이용 동의(혜택), 제 3자제공동의 추기*/ ,CASE WHEN A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE = 'Y' THEN '동의' WHEN A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE = 'N' THEN '미동의' ELSE A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE END AS PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE ,CASE WHEN A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE = 'Y' THEN '동의' WHEN A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE = 'N' THEN '미동의' ELSE A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE END AS OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE
,CASE WHEN A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE = 'Y' THEN '동의' WHEN A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE = 'N' THEN '미동의' ELSE A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE END AS OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE ,CASE WHEN A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE = 'Y' THEN '동의' WHEN A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE = 'N' THEN '미동의' ELSE A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE END AS OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE
FROM MSP_MRKT_AGR_MGMT A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.AGR_YN = #{searchAgrYn} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.STRT_DTTM AND A.END_DTTM
AND (A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal} OR A.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchVal}))
AND UPPER(B.SUB_LINK_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND B.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchVal}
ORDER BY B.SUB_LINK_NAME

/* MrktMgmtMapper.getMspMrktAgrMgmtByInfo */ SELECT A.AGR_YN AS agrYn ,A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE AS personalInfoCollectAgree ,A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE AS othersTrnsAgree ,A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE AS othersTrnsKtAgree ,A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE AS othersAdReceiveAgree ,TO_CHAR(A.MRKT_RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS mrktRvisnDttm ,TO_CHAR(A.PERSONAL_INFO_RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS personalInfoRvisnDttm ,TO_CHAR(A.OTHERS_TRNS_RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS othersTrnsRvisnDttm ,TO_CHAR(A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS othersTrnsKtAgree ,TO_CHAR(A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS othersAdReceiveAgree FROM MSP_MRKT_AGR_MGMT A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.END_DTTM = '99991231235959'

/* MrktMgmtMapper.getContractInfo */ SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo , CUS.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO CUS WHERE SUB.CUSTOMER_ID = CUS.CUSTOMER_ID AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND SUB.SUB_STATUS <> 'C'
